title: Add Tickflow run record persistence
description: Persist run-level records under .tick/logs/pi-runner/runs/<run-id>.json containing repo identity, epic id, planned ticks, worktree paths, leases, status, timestamps, and per-tick attempt artifact references.
acceptance_criteria: Starting /tickflow-run writes a run record; each supervised tick updates its status and artifact references; completed/interrupted runs can be listed from run records.
